results.proposal:
Proposal for Jubilant Ingrevia / Annual Report FY 2026-27 | January 2025

Dear Sir/Madam,

We truly appreciate the interest shown by you in WP Communications for working on Jubilant Ingrevia Annual Report FY 2026-27. We are pleased to give you our best competitive proposal along with other details.

SCOPE OF WORK:

• Conceptualize and provide theme suggestions for the report based on macro developments in the BFSI industry and Jubilant Ingrevia's strategic focus areas
• Creating the Cover Design and defining the Visual Properties of the document including typography, color palette, visual elements, and overall design language
• Drafting of Chairman/MD message based on inputs and strategic direction provided by Jubilant Ingrevia
• Editing, enhancing and designing of non-financial content provided by client (estimated pages: 40) including company overview, business segments, operations review, strategic initiatives, and performance highlights
• Edit, enhance and design the Management Discussion and Analysis (MDA) section based on client draft (estimated pages: 10)
• Editing, enhancement and layout of Board/Director's Report with improved readability and professional presentation
• Designing template and full layout of financial/statutory section including Director's Report, Auditor's Report, Corporate Governance Report, BRSR, Financial Statements, Notes to Accounts, Notice etc. (estimated pages: 200)
• Professional layout of BRSR section with data visualization and enhanced presentation (data/content to be shared by client)
• Layout of Corporate Governance Report with structured formatting and visual enhancement (content provided by client)
• High-resolution conversion of the entire report — cover to cover — and delivery of print-ready files in PDF format suitable for professional printing

PLEASE NOTE:

• Cost excludes taxes as levied by government from time to time
• Cost excludes outstation travel (air travel, road travel) and accommodation by WP representative beyond the initial pre project commencement meeting
• Cost excludes image purchase cost from royalty free sites and photography costs
• Layout/art working of the entire document will be in publishing software (InDesign)
• Re-layout of statutory and financial pages will be charged at Rs. 650 + taxes per page
• Cost of additional theme/non-statutory section pages will be charged at Rs. 7,500 + taxes per page and Statutory financial pages will be charged at Rs. 1,750 + taxes per page
• If the project is aborted at any stage for no fault of the agency, 85% of the total amount shall be payable to WP, with the remaining 15% being waived off
• In case, there is a change of brief provided by the client, post approval of text and design approach, an additional cost ranging from 10-50% of the total cost would be levied, depending on the stage at which the brief is changed
• We require a written approval letter and a purchase order of acceptance before we commence the project work
• This proposal is valid for next 30 days only
• Non-financial content/inputs to be provided by Jubilant Ingrevia as per agreed timeline
• BRSR data to be provided by Jubilant Ingrevia in the required format

TIMELINE:

Project timeline: Estimated 3 months from the date of commencement

COSTING:

WP Communications charges for the above scope of work will be Rs. [To be discussed] + applicable taxes.

PAYMENT TERMS:

• Formal Purchase order on approval & 50% advance at the start of the project
• Balance payment 15 days after the closure of the project

BENEFITS:

• Working with a specialized Top-notch Financial & Corporate Communications agency
• Providing a one-stop solution for all your requirements
• A designated senior "Project Head" to service the account
• Agreed timeline to execute the projects
• Well defined procedures, suggested time schedules, SOPs and constant interaction to ensure minimum last minute hurdles

>>> DIGITAL PROPOSITION: We also propose a Digital E-Report with interactive microsite, AI-powered report assistant, and optional highlights video — see next page for details.

WP assures you of best service at all times. We trust you would find the above to your satisfaction. Should you desire any further information, please feel free to contact us.

Sincerely,
CA Shailesh Vyas,
Director (Marketing)
+91 98200 67242

--- APPENDIX: Digital Report Proposition ---

Digital E-Report for Jubilant Ingrevia Annual Report FY 2026-27

As a value-add, we propose the development of a Digital E-Report to complement the printed report. This responsive microsite brings your report to life digitally.

Scope of Digital E-Report:

• Concept, design and development of a responsive microsite
• Designed in accordance with the Annual Report, retaining content from the printed version
• Sitemap and section identification for the homepage (mutually agreed)
• Number of HTML pages: Home + 15 inside pages
• MD&A, Statutory Reports, Financial Statements and Annexures as PDF cutouts from the report
• Animation on text and call to actions
• Mobile, tablet and desktop responsive design
• Number of scrolls for home page: max 10
• Number of scrolls per inside page: max 8
• Multi-browser functionality (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
• Hyper-linkages to social media platforms (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn sharing)
• Technology: HTML development with Bootstrap framework

Additional Scope (Optional — To Be Discussed Separately):

RAG AI — Annual Report Interactive Assistant:
• As a value-added extension, WyattPrism proposes the integration of a RAG AI (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) powered Interactive Assistant
• The complete Annual Report will be ingested as the sole knowledge source — making it a closed, secure system that answers exclusively from the report's own data. No external information or third-party data is used, ensuring complete accuracy and auditability
• How It Works: The entire Annual Report content — Financials, ESG data, Chairman's Message, MD&A, BRSR, and all narrative sections — is indexed and fed into the RAG AI engine. Stakeholders, investors, and users can interact with the report through a conversational chat interface embedded on the microsite
• Scope includes:
  - Ingestion of the complete Annual Report into the RAG AI knowledge base (sole and exclusive source — no internet, no external data)
  - Chat-based conversational interface integrated into the Digital Report microsite — clean, intuitive, and branded to the client
  - Live voice conversation mode — users can speak queries and receive spoken responses
  - Powered by Google Gemini API (usage-based pricing)
  - API costs for Year 1 to be borne entirely by WyattPrism at no charge to the client
  - Strictly closed knowledge system — no hallucination from external sources
  - Mobile responsive and accessible on all devices
• From Year 2 onwards, API usage charges will be passed through to client at actuals
• Commercials will be discussed separately

Digital E-Report Exclusions:

• Post-launch support, hosting and maintenance beyond go-live
• Photography, videography, and purchase of royalty-free images
• UAT to be done at client's end
• Basic SEO — title, meta tags, descriptions to be provided by client
• RAG AI is separate from base Digital E-Report scope and will be quoted separately
• Gemini API costs from Year 2 onwards (passed through to client at actuals)
• Server hosting and cloud infrastructure costs (to be arranged by client IT team)
• Content beyond the Annual Report; any additional data sources, custom AI training, or fine-tuning

Digital E-Report Timeline: 10 working days (post content finalization)

Digital E-Report Cost: Rs. [To be discussed] + applicable taxes
